Release notes for Pebble firmware v4.0, highlighting optimizations in Health, Timeline, and interface.

# Purpose
The content provides a brief overview of the enhancements made to Pebble Health, Timeline, and the Pebble interface, emphasizing a "glance and go" lifestyle. It highlights the ability to access information quickly and act promptly. Users are encouraged to update their watch and app to version 4.0 for these improvements, with additional information available at the specified blog URL.
